raw_consumer_statement:
On XX/XX/2024, I ordered movies from XXXX XXXX {$XXXX} and {$XXXX}. 

I never recieved the shipment of the movies and at the time I was in the hospital due to being elder abused and attacked at a XXXX. 

I contacted XXXX, a XXXX representative who informed me that I would be credited with the charges totaling {$XXXX} and $ XXXX would not need to pay for the movies. He confirmed I did not recieve the shipment of movies. See attached recording of the call. 

I contacted XXXX XXXX ( XXXX  ) who also informed me by letters that they investigated my dispute and would credit charges totaling {$XXXX} and {$XXXX}. See attached letters. 

XXXX  refused to credit the charges.
